name: Create an Advertising Banner in Canva
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Canva is a free tool to design and create media assets for your website. We recommend Canva for creating advertising banners. To create a banner in Canva:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.canva.com/signup", "children": [{"text": "Sign up to Canva"}]}, {"text": ". Canva is free for basic accounts, and you can upgrade to Pro for additional features."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.canva.com/login", "children": [{"text": "Log in to your Canva account"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the menu, click on "}, {"text": "Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the search bar, search for "}, {"text": "Web Banners", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CreateanAdvertisingBannerinCanva01.05T5g00000sz8QKEAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CreateanAdvertisingBannerinCanva01.05T5g00000sz8QKEAY.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 245}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pick a template to use as a starting point for your own banner. It will be loaded into the editor for you to customise."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you want to try other templates it's easy to switch on the "}, {"text": "Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Background image."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Main text."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sub text."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are three elements you'll be able to change in most templates:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the background image by pasting (ctrl/cmd + v) a new one on top. Then expand it to fit the size of your banner. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://unsplash.com/", "children": [{"text": "Unsplash"}]}, {"text": " and "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.pexels.com/", "children": [{"text": "Pexels"}]}, {"text": " are great resources for free stock images."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/images/canva2.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/images/canva2.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit the text fields to display your own message. The toolbar at the top lets you adjust font, size, colour, and other elements."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CreateanAdvertisingBannerinCanva03.05T5g00000sz82xEAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CreateanAdvertisingBannerinCanva03.05T5g00000sz82xEAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 244}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once you're happy with your banner, click the "}, {"text": "Download", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to save it to your computer."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now add the image to your website ad banner space."}]}]
